positive: Minimalist geometric design featuring a stylized, elegant mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should be rendered in deep indigo and vibrant burnt orange gradients, overlaid with subtle, abstract constellation patterns using gold foil texture. The composition must be centered, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean lines, strong graphic contrast, vectorized style, highly detailed, symmetrical composition, clean flat illustration look, perfect for t-shirts.
